en_title: Helldivers 2 Dev Confirms Roguelite Systems, Called Planet Warfronts, as Part of Big Changes Coming to the Game
cn_title: 《绝地潜兵2》确认将加入Roguelite星球前线系统
subtitle: 星球大战新玩法
opus_summary: 《绝地潜兵2》开发商Arrowhead公布了多项重大更新计划，包括名为「星球前线」的Roguelite系统。该系统将任务按类别分组，玩家需在星球上争夺战略要地，并带来改变游戏玩法的效果。此外，本月将上线持续1-3周的银河战争战役，提供特殊奖励；个人任务改为个人战役进度系统；飞船模块也将大改，并计划增加新飞船。游戏总监Mikael Eriksson表示，这些改动旨在让解放星球的过程更具史诗感和独特性。

paragraphs.en: Helldivers 2 developer Arrowhead has outlined some major changes coming to the game, including roguelite systems called Planet Warfronts.
paragraphs.cn: 《绝地潜兵2》开发商Arrowhead公布了游戏即将迎来的一些重大改动，包括名为「星球前线」的Roguelite系统。

paragraphs.en: In a post on Steam outlining the future of community and player progression in Helldivers 2, game director Mikael Eriksson confirmed Planet Warfronts is the roguelite system Arrowhead CCO and Helldivers 2 creative director, Johan Pilestedt, .
paragraphs.cn: 在Steam上发布的一篇关于《绝地潜兵2》社区和玩家进度未来的帖子中，游戏总监Mikael Eriksson确认，「星球前线」正是Arrowhead首席创意官兼《绝地潜兵2》创意总监Johan Pilestedt此前提到的Roguelite系统。

paragraphs.en: “Before we launched the game, we experimented with dynamic warfronts on planets, where players needed to make strategic community decisions on a planet level in order to liberate it,” Eriksson explained. “While it was promising, we realized we didn't have the content needed to do it justice at the time. We feel we've now added enough content to realize the vision we had for Planet Warfronts, and it's going to be the next big thing we're working towards in the Galactic War. When you've seen Johan talk about experimenting with roguelite systems, he was referring to this.”
paragraphs.cn: 「在游戏发售前，我们曾尝试过星球上的动态前线系统，玩家需要在星球层面做出战略性社区决策才能解放该星球，」Eriksson解释道。「虽然这个想法很有前景，但我们意识到当时没有足够的内容来充分实现它。现在我们觉得已经添加了足够的内容，可以实现在『星球前线』上的愿景，这将是我们在银河战争中努力的下一个重大目标。当你看到Johan谈论尝试Roguelite系统时，他指的就是这个。」

paragraphs.en: When Planet Warfronts goes live, missions will be grouped under different categories:
paragraphs.cn: 当「星球前线」上线后，任务将按不同类别分组：

paragraphs.en: Eriksson said players will fight to reach key strategic locations on planets, like cities, which can have different active enemy variants in different areas of the planet. “Of course, you’ll still have the Game Masters to contend with, too,” Eriksson insisted. In the final version of this feature, there will also be gameplay altering effects and consequences for achieving planet liberation goals, like reaching and liberating a city within X time or disabling enemy artillery in one location to unlock crucial Operations.
paragraphs.cn: Eriksson表示，玩家将争夺星球上的关键战略位置，例如城市，这些城市在不同区域可能出现不同的活跃敌人变体。「当然，你们仍然需要应对游戏管理员，」Eriksson强调。在该功能的最终版本中，达成星球解放目标还将带来改变游戏玩法的效果和后果，例如在X时间内抵达并解放一座城市，或在一个地点禁用敌方火炮以解锁关键行动。

paragraphs.en: “The intention is to make it more fun to liberate planets with your squad and deepen the Galactic War and Community Progression systems,” Eriksson continued. “We want liberating planets to feel unique and epic for everyone. We have some development and design work ahead to make these feel great and provide the best experience, but I wanted to share just one of the ideas we have in active development. More to come on these changes in the next few months!”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们的目标是让与小队一起解放星球变得更有趣，并深化银河战争和社区进度系统，」Eriksson继续说道。「我们希望让每个人都能感受到解放星球的独特和史诗感。我们还有一些开发和设计工作要做，以确保这些功能体验出色，但我想先分享一个我们正在积极开发的想法。未来几个月还会有更多关于这些改动的消息！」

paragraphs.en: When Pilestedt teased the roguelite mode, he said it “changes the game fundamentally!” That was enough to set fans of the explosive co-op action shooter into overdrive imagining how a roguelite mode would work in the game, which revolves around open and shut missions restricted by time limits.
paragraphs.cn: 当Pilestedt暗示Roguelite模式时，他表示这「将从根本上改变游戏！」这足以让这款火爆合作动作射击游戏的粉丝们兴奋不已，纷纷想象Roguelite模式将如何在以时间限制的开放式任务为核心的游戏中运作。

paragraphs.en: But that’s not all. Helldivers 2 will get Galactic War Campaigns this month. Campaigns are the “next evolution” of Major Orders, and will last 1-3 weeks. “The intention that it will always be clear what the active Campaign is, how it's going, what the outcomes have been, and what's at stake,” Eriksson said, admitting this has not always been the case before with how players interact with the Galactic War.
paragraphs.cn: 但这还不是全部。《绝地潜兵2》本月将迎来银河战争战役。战役是主要命令的「下一次进化」，将持续1-3周。「我们的目标是让玩家始终清楚当前进行的是哪个战役、进展如何、结果如何以及利害关系是什么，」Eriksson说道，他承认此前玩家与银河战争的互动并非总是如此清晰。

paragraphs.en: The introduction of Campaigns means there will always be at least one Campaign reward if the conditions are met. “We want to make these rewards special, because we also think players should earn more than just medals,” Eriksson explained. Some will alter gameplay, some will be cool items. “It also means there is more stuff for players to work towards outside of warbonds,” Eriksson teased. “Pray J.O.E.L is feeling generous, the first reward you’ll be working to unlock is a new FRV!”
paragraphs.cn: 战役的引入意味着只要满足条件，至少会有一个战役奖励。「我们希望让这些奖励变得特别，因为我们也认为玩家应该获得不仅仅是奖章，」Eriksson解释道。有些奖励会改变游戏玩法，有些则是酷炫的物品。「这也意味着玩家在战争债券之外还有更多目标可以追求，」Eriksson透露。「祈祷J.O.E.L慷慨解囊吧，你们要解锁的第一个奖励是一辆新的FRV！」

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Personal Orders are changing into a system called Personal Campaign Progression. The intent here is for every Galactic War Campaign to come with a personal progression reward track. “That way, even if the community fails to reach a larger goal, players can still do their part toward their personal goals and get rewarded with cool things to mark their participation in various Campaigns,” Eriksson said.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，个人任务将改为名为「个人战役进度」的系统。其目的是让每个银河战争战役都附带一条个人进度奖励轨道。「这样一来，即使社区未能达成更大的目标，玩家仍然可以朝着个人目标努力，并获得酷炫的奖励来纪念他们在各个战役中的参与，」Eriksson说道。

paragraphs.en: “This change won't happen with the launch of Galactic War Campaigns, but we are planning to deploy it this year.”
paragraphs.cn: 「这一改动不会随银河战争战役同步上线，但我们计划在今年内推出。」

paragraphs.en: And finally, Arrowhead has news on upgrading your ship, with an overhaul of the ship module system that significantly increases the offerings for players to progress. Perhaps more exciting, Arrowhead is also adding more ships.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，Arrowhead还带来了飞船升级的消息：飞船模块系统将进行大改，大幅增加玩家的进度选项。或许更令人兴奋的是，Arrowhead还将增加更多飞船。

paragraphs.en: “The biggest shift we've done internally is we now have a dedicated ship team, working on the first new ship,” Eriksson revealed. “Our intention is that each new ship will have their own unique progression paths, specializations and customizations. And if you like the ships, we want to keep adding them; at least the ones we've planned so far!
paragraphs.cn: 「我们在内部做出的最大改变是，现在有了一个专门的飞船团队，正在开发第一艘新飞船，」Eriksson透露。「我们的目标是让每艘新飞船都拥有独特的进度路径、专精和自定义选项。如果你们喜欢这些飞船，我们会继续增加；至少到目前为止计划中的那些都会做出来！」

paragraphs.en: “I can't share when the new ship can reach your hands... yet, but I'll be sharing more details later this year for certain.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我还不能透露新飞船何时能交到你们手中……但今年晚些时候我肯定会分享更多细节。」

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
